song.title: More Love More Power
song.lyrics: [v1] More love, more power More of You in my life [c1] I will worship You with all of my heart And I will worship You with all of my mind And I will worship You with all of my strength For you are my Lord [c2] I will seek Your face with all of my heart And I seek Your face You with all of my mind And I seek Your face You with all of my strength For you are my Lord You are my Lord.
